ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text sample */,
  "text_excerpt" TEXT /* The actual content of the text sample */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the text sample was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the text sample */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., social media, review, forum) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Category or topic of the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample being analyzed */,
  "label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted sentiment (e.g., pos, neg) */,
  "compound" REAL /* Compound score indicating the sentiment strength */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Indicates whether the prediction was accurate (yes/no) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES models ("model_version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded trend */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences for the sentiment label on that date */,
  "average_sentiment" REAL /* Average sentiment score for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES predictions ("label")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trend that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, anomaly) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES sentiment_trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., machine learning, rule-based) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_samples" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "sample_id")
)
